loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing total active power and key stats for the Ove section; some panel members (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump) are dark and do not report live data.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power states across all LT-PCC feeders; 4 members (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump) are dark (no data) and render as blank rows.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power (active_power_total_kw) for the panel's outgoing feeders; per-member breakdowns and consumption percentage are omitted due to missing dedicated feeder columns and unknown nameplate capacity.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend and peak; some outgoing feeders (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System, Domestic Water Pump) are dark and omitted from the roster.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage, current unbalance, and total current for the 21 outgoing feeders; 3 feeders (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System) are dark and will render as blanks.
